misha.browser 0.1.1
  • Reference
    • Configuring misha.browser with YAML
  • Changelog

Apply a transformation pipeline to data

apply_transforms.Rd

Uses vectorized matrix operations where possible for performance. Transforms that can be vectorized: log2, log10, sqrt, clip Transforms that need per-column processing: smooth, zscore, minmax, quantile, expr

Usage

apply_transforms(data, transforms, value_cols)

Arguments

data

Data frame with columns: chrom, start, end, pos, and value columns

transforms

List of transform specifications

value_cols

Column names containing values to transform

Value

Transformed data frame

On this page
